title: Coastal storm-surge retreat line
summary: Identify higher ground reachable without crossing beaches, river mouths, underpasses, sea walls, or roads already taking waves.
content: Identify higher ground reachable without crossing beaches, river mouths, underpasses, sea walls, or roads already taking waves. Leave on official warning or clear rapid water rise rather than watching from the shore. Do not approach the sea, harbour, cliffs, or flooded roads for photographs.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Coastal storm-surge retreat line”.
